---
title: "Writings"
execute:
  echo: false
---

![](images/image-230407671.png){fig-align="center"}

I write for a variety of publications, both popular and academic. Below is a list of columns and op-eds, policy and research papers, and book reviews. Feel free to contact me if you'd like me to write for you.

::: {.mk-table}

```{r writings_table, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(DT)
library(htmltools)

fix_title_case <- function(x) {
  x <- str_to_title(x)
  for (w in c(" A "," An "," The "," And "," But "," For "," Of "," In "," On "," To "," With ")) {
    x <- str_replace_all(x, w, str_to_lower(w))
  }
  str_remove_all(x, "[\u00d4\u00d5]")
}

my_data <- read_csv("data/mywork.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    Title    = fix_title_case(`Original Title`),
    Date     = as.Date(Date, "%m/%d/%y"),
    TypeRaw  = str_replace_all(Format, "White Paper", "Research")
  ) %>%
  filter(TypeRaw %in% c("Article", "Book Review", "Research")) %>%
  arrange(desc(Date)) %>%
  mutate(
    Year   = year(Date),
    Month  = format(Date, "%b"),
    TitleHTML = paste0(
      '<a href="', Link, '" target="_blank" rel="noopener">', Title, '</a>',
      '<span class="mk-outlet">', Outlet, '</span>'
    ),
    TypeHTML = paste0('<span class="mk-pill" data-type="', TypeRaw, '">', TypeRaw, '</span>')
  ) %>%
  select(Year, Month, Type = TypeHTML, Title = TitleHTML)

datatable(
  my_data,
  rownames = FALSE,
  escape   = FALSE,
  class    = "row-border compact",
  options  = list(
    pageLength   = 25,
    lengthMenu   = c(10, 25, 50, 100),
    dom          = "<'top'fl>rt<'bottom'ip>",
    autoWidth    = FALSE,
    order        = list(list(0, 'desc')),
    columnDefs   = list(
      list(targets = 0, className = "mk-col-year"),
      list(targets = 1, className = "mk-col-month"),
      list(targets = 2, className = "mk-col-type", orderable = FALSE),
      list(targets = 3, className = "mk-col-title")
    ),
    language = list(
      search       = "",
      searchPlaceholder = "Search writings…",
      lengthMenu   = "Show _MENU_",
      info         = "_START_–_END_ of _TOTAL_",
      infoEmpty    = "No results",
      infoFiltered = "(filtered from _MAX_)",
      paginate     = list(previous = "‹ Prev", `next` = "Next ›")
    )
  )
)
```

:::
